zh.Brecon, Powys, Wales: 英國威爾斯波斯布雷孔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace de Briwere於大約1186年出生在英國素可布拉波時，她的父親William de Briwere II42歲，母親Beatrice de Vaux38歲。她於1205年之前與Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1251年在英國英格蘭波克夏溫莎女爵享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace de Briwere于大约1186年出生在英国素可布拉波时，她的父亲William de Briwere II42岁，母亲Beatrice de Vaux38岁。她于1205年之前与Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1251年在英国英格兰波克夏溫莎女爵享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace de Briwere was born about 1186, in Bramber, Sussex, England, her father, William de Briwere II, was 42 and her mother, Beatrice de Vaux, was 38. She married Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose before 1205, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1251, in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace de Briwere est née environ 1186, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Briwere II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Vaux, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose avant 1205, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1251, à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace de Briwere um 1186 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Briwere II 42 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Vaux 38. Sie hat vor 1205 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1251 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace de Briwere è nata il circa 1186 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Briwere II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Vaux, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose prima del 1205, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1251, nel Windsor, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace de Briwereが約1186年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Briwere IIは42歳，母Beatrice de Vauxは38歳であった。1205年以前にイギリスイギリススセックスでLord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1251年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace de Briwere(이)가 대략 1186년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Briwere II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1205년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace de Briwere nasceu aproximadamente 1186, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Briwere II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Vaux, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose antes 1205, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1251, em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace de Briwere родилась около 1186 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Briwere II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vaux, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose перед 1205 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1251 г. в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace de Briwere nació aproximadamente 1186, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Briwere II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Vaux, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose antes de 1205, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1251, en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
